about.title: Concept Note | Strategic Pathways

mission.label: Our Mission
mission.headline: Transforming Brain Drain into Brain Circulation
mission.body: Strategic Pathways mobilises study-abroad returnees and diaspora professionals into impactful local projects, fostering sustainable talent circulation across Kenya.

problem.headline: The Challenge We're Solving
problem.body1: Kenya invests heavily in educating its brightest minds abroad, yet many struggle to find meaningful work upon return. Meanwhile, counties, NGOs, and institutions lack access to this pool of globally trained talent.
problem.quote: Talent is everywhere. Opportunity is not.

expertise.title: Underutilized Expertise
expertise.desc: Returnees face limited pathways to apply their skills locally.

gaps.title: Institutional Gaps
gaps.desc: Organizations struggle to find credible, vetted professionals.

solution.headline: Our Solution
solution.subheadline: A platform that connects, verifies, and mobilizes talent for impact.

items.title: Verified Profiles
items.desc: Multi-tier verification ensures credibility and trust.

items.title: Talent Matching
items.desc: Smart algorithms connect professionals with relevant opportunities.

items.title: Project Marketplace
items.desc: Access vetted consultancies, research partnerships, and ventures.

items.title: Capacity Building
items.desc: Mentorship, peer learning, and leadership development.

items.title: Impact Tracking
items.desc: Measure and showcase your contributions to local development.

items.title: Institutional Trust
items.desc: Counties, NGOs, and donors access pre-vetted talent pools.

objectives.headline: Our Goals
list: Partner with 10+ counties, universities, and NGOs
Establish a replicable model for talent circulation across Africa

primary.title: Primary Beneficiaries
primary.returnees: Study-abroad returnees seeking meaningful local work

secondary.title: Secondary Beneficiaries
secondary.smes: SMEs and startups needing strategic guidance

short.title: Short-Term (Year 1)
short.desc: 200+ professionals onboarded, 15+ projects delivered, 10+ institutional partnerships.

medium.title: Medium-Term (Years 2-3)
medium.desc: Scale to 1,000+ members, expand to 20+ counties, establish venture-building arm.

long.title: Long-Term Vision
long.desc1: Become the leading platform for talent circulation in East Africa.
long.desc2: Demonstrate that brain drain can be reversed through strategic pathways.

about.conclusion: Together, we're building a future where global skills drive local impact.
